auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Whop API key sent with the Authorization: Bearer header. Create an Account API key or reveal an App API key from the Whop dashboard using the official API key guide: https://docs.whop.com/developer/api/quickstart#create-an-api-key.

actions.name: get_authorized_user
actions.description: Retrieve a Whop authorized user by ID.

id.description: The unique Whop authorized user identifier.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for retrieving a Whop authorized user.

id.description: The unique Whop authorized user identifier.

role.description: Role assigned to a Whop authorized user.

anyOf.description: The user's display name.
The user's email address when the credential has email access.

actions.name: get_company
actions.description: Retrieve a Whop company by ID or route slug.

id.description: The unique Whop company identifier or route slug.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for retrieving a Whop company.

actions.name: get_membership
actions.description: Retrieve a Whop membership by membership ID or license key.

id.description: The unique Whop membership identifier or license key.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for retrieving a Whop membership.

created_at.description: The datetime when this membership was created.

anyOf.description: The datetime when the user joined the company.

updated_at.description: The datetime when this membership was last updated.

anyOf.description: URL where the customer can manage this membership.
Whop linked resource summary.
The user's display name.
The user's email address when the credential has email access.
Whop user summary.

cancel_at_period_end.description: Whether this membership will cancel at period end.

anyOf.description: Whop membership cancellation reason.
Free-text cancellation reason.
The datetime when this membership was canceled.
The membership billing currency.
Custom metadata stored on the plan.
Whop linked resource summary.
Custom metadata stored on the product.
Software license key linked to this membership.
Custom metadata stored on this membership.

payment_collection_paused.description: Whether recurring payment collection is paused for this membership.

anyOf.description: Checkout configuration identifier that produced this membership.

actions.name: get_product
actions.description: Retrieve a Whop product by ID.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for retrieving a Whop product.

created_at.description: The datetime when this product was created.

updated_at.description: The datetime when this product was last updated.

anyOf.description: The product display name.
The product visibility state.
The product marketing headline.

verified.description: Whether Whop has verified this product.

member_count.description: The active membership count for this product.

anyOf.description: The product public route slug.

published_reviews_count.description: The number of published reviews for this product.

anyOf.description: External identifier stored on this product.
Custom metadata stored on this product.

actions.name: list_authorized_users
actions.description: List authorized Whop team members with optional company, user, role, date, and cursor filters.

after.description: Cursor for returning resources after this position.

before.description: Cursor for returning resources before this position.

first.description: Number of resources to return from the start of the list.

last.description: Number of resources to return from the end of the list.

role.description: Role assigned to a Whop authorized user.

created_before.description: Only return authorized users created before this timestamp.

created_after.description: Only return authorized users created after this timestamp.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Whop authorized users.

id.description: The unique Whop authorized user identifier.

role.description: Role assigned to a Whop authorized user.

anyOf.description: The user's display name.
The user's email address when the credential has email access.
Cursor for the next page when paginating forward.
Cursor for the previous page when paginating backward.

has_next_page.description: Whether more resources are available after this page.

has_previous_page.description: Whether more resources are available before this page.

outputSchema.description: Paginated Whop authorized user list response.

actions.name: list_companies
actions.description: List Whop companies accessible to the credential, optionally filtering connected accounts by parent company.

after.description: Cursor for returning resources after this position.

before.description: Cursor for returning resources before this position.

first.description: Number of resources to return from the start of the list.

last.description: Number of resources to return from the end of the list.

parent_company_id.description: Parent platform company ID for listing connected accounts.

direction.description: Sort direction for returned Whop resources.

created_before.description: Only return companies created before this timestamp.

created_after.description: Only return companies created after this timestamp.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Whop companies.

anyOf.description: Cursor for the next page when paginating forward.
Cursor for the previous page when paginating backward.

has_next_page.description: Whether more resources are available after this page.

has_previous_page.description: Whether more resources are available before this page.

actions.name: list_memberships
actions.description: List Whop memberships for a company with optional product, plan, user, status, and cursor filters.

after.description: Cursor for returning resources after this position.

before.description: Cursor for returning resources before this position.

first.description: Number of resources to return from the start of the list.

last.description: Number of resources to return from the end of the list.

company_id.description: The Whop company identifier. Required when using an API key.

direction.description: Sort direction for returned Whop resources.

product_ids.description: Product identifiers to filter memberships by.

cancel_options.description: Cancellation reasons to filter memberships by.

plan_ids.description: Plan identifiers to filter memberships by.

user_ids.description: User identifiers to filter memberships by.

promo_code_ids.description: Promo code identifiers to filter memberships by.

created_before.description: Only return memberships created before this timestamp.

created_after.description: Only return memberships created after this timestamp.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Whop memberships.

created_at.description: The datetime when this membership was created.

anyOf.description: The datetime when the user joined the company.

updated_at.description: The datetime when this membership was last updated.

anyOf.description: URL where the customer can manage this membership.
Whop linked resource summary.
The user's display name.
The user's email address when the credential has email access.
Whop user summary.

cancel_at_period_end.description: Whether this membership will cancel at period end.

anyOf.description: Whop membership cancellation reason.
Free-text cancellation reason.
The datetime when this membership was canceled.
The membership billing currency.
Custom metadata stored on the plan.

Custom metadata stored on this membership.

payment_collection_paused.description: Whether recurring payment collection is paused for this membership.

anyOf.description: Checkout configuration identifier that produced this membership.
Cursor for the next page when paginating forward.
Cursor for the previous page when paginating backward.

actions.name: list_products
actions.description: List Whop products belonging to a company with optional visibility, type, sort, and cursor filters.

access_pass_types.description: Product access pass types to include.

direction.description: Sort direction for returned Whop resources.

order.description: Product field to sort by. Defaults to created_at.

first.description: Number of products to return. Default and max is 100.

after.description: Cursor for returning products after this position.

last.description: Number of products to return from the end of the range.

before.description: Cursor for returning products before this position.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Whop products.

created_at.description: The datetime when this product was created.

updated_at.description: The datetime when this product was last updated.

anyOf.description: The product display name.
The product visibility state.
The product marketing headline.

verified.description: Whether Whop has verified this product.

member_count.description: The active membership count for this product.

anyOf.description: The product public route slug.

published_reviews_count.description: The number of published reviews for this product.

anyOf.description: External identifier stored on this product.
Custom metadata stored on this product.
Cursor for the next page when paginating forward.
Cursor for the previous page when paginating backward.

has_next_page.description: Whether more resources are available after this page.

has_previous_page.description: Whether more resources are available before this page.
